description: Unveil your vibrant range of cosmetics with our extraordinary email template, designed to celebrate love in all its beautiful forms. This template is perfect for e-commerce businesses in the beauty & personal care industry aiming to promote their products during seasonal events, such as LGBTQ Pride Month. Infused with a rainbow of colors, it's an excellent way to showcase your makeup line and retail offerings while demonstrating support for the LGBTQ community. The message is clear: love transcends boundaries. This template is a superb tool to boost your online shop visibility and sales, aligning your brand with a powerful message of inclusivity and pride.
short_description: Promote your cosmetics range with our email template, perfect for beauty & personal care e-commerce businesses. Ideal for LGBTQ Pride Month and seasonal promotions, it showcases your makeup line with a vibrant rainbow theme. Boost your online shop sales while supporting inclusivity and pride.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
